data.acceptance:
1. Overview tabs do not render zero-beat columns; tabs with no beats show a compact empty state instead of empty columns.
2. Visible overview columns use a dynamic width based on the available overview viewport divided by visible column count plus one, with sane min/max bounds for readability.
3. Beat tile typography and metadata typography are reduced by one notch relative to the current overview styling.
4. Column state label pills use a smaller font, wrap when needed, and do not clip their leading text.
5. Existing tab routing remains intact: Work Items, Exploration, Gates, and Terminated keep their current state ownership.
6. Browser verification confirms desktop and mobile layouts have no page-level horizontal overflow.
